name: The Quiet Strength
description: You don't say it — you do it. And what you've built speaks louder than anything you could have put into words.

name: The Steady Climber
description: You move slowly and with purpose. Every action is intentional. You're building something that lasts.

name: The Spark Keeper
description: You make things happen. You show up. You keep the energy alive — and you do it so naturally that nobody notices how much work it takes.

name: The Living Flame
description: You burn present and warm. You're the reason people around you feel seen — and your partner, most of all.

name: The Deep Writer
description: You love through words and reflection. You hold the stories. One day your partner will realise all the letters you never sent were already heard.

name: The Tender Witness
description: You are the one who remembers — the small things, the meaningful moments, the person they were when you first met.

name: The Open Door
description: You make it easy to come home. You lead with warmth, openness and the gift of showing up without armour.

name: The Intentional Partner
description: You are here on purpose. You chose this, chose to show up, and chose to keep going. That is the rarest thing.
